children.content: Windsor Identity Zync, Access, & Retirement Dashboard
Have you checked with The WIZARD?
Search by name, email, phone, extension, or ID...
Upcoming onboarding processes by person, with blockers, workflow state, and external IIQ follow-up status.
IncidentIQ user is polled hourly by email after the account exists. Earliest matching Aeries and Verkada tickets are linked when found.
No local write owned by this app. User lookup retries at most once per hour.
This dashboard surfaces external IIQ follow-up status after the user exists.
People are shown by person rather than spreadsheet row. Sensitive lifecycle data remains restricted to HR visibility.
